meta.title: Jaguar XK Straight-Six Engine — Specs, Reliability & Replacement Cost

hero.h1: Jaguar XK Straight-Six Engine — Specs, Reliability & Replacement Cost
hero.subHeadline: The Jaguar XK straight-six is a legendary DOHC inline-six that powered Jaguar for over four decades — robust and characterful, but timing chain tensioners and carburettor setup need careful attention. Backed by real UK enquiries in 2025.

rows.value: Exclusive to Jaguar (also military: Alvis, Daimler)

rows.metric: Confidence: 85% confidence — based on historical production data and specialist rebuild reports.
Reconditioned supply midpoint falls in £5,000–£6,999 band

rows.value: Robust design; most failures are rebuildable rather than catastrophic

rows.metric: Specialist parts available but not off-the-shelf; growing remanufacturing support

rows.value: Reconditioned cost ~30–44% of lowest classic host-vehicle value

rows.metric: Sum of the five rows above
rows.value: One-line verdict: The XK straight-six is one of the great British engines — durable and rebuildable, but tensioner wear and carburettor setup need specialist care — buy with documented rebuild history.

rows.metric: Best for: Classic Jaguar enthusiasts who appreciate a robust, characterful engine and don't mind specialist maintenance.
rows.value: Avoid if: You're looking for a modern, low-maintenance daily driver or don't have access to a specialist.

rows.metric: XK Straight-Six — Where It's Fitted (Jaguar Models)
rows.value: The XK6 engine was produced in five displacements across six decades:
XK120, XK140, XK150, Mk VII, Mk VIII, Mk 2, 340, S-Type (original), C-Type, XJ6

rows.metric: XK150, Mk 2, Mk IX, Mk X, E-Type (Series 1), S-Type (original), XKSS, D-Type

rows.value: 420, 420G, E-Type (Series 1.5–3), XJ6 (Series 1–3), Daimler Sovereign, Daimler DS420 Limousine
The last Jaguar car fitted with the XK6 engine was the 1986 XJ6; the final production application was the 1992 Daimler DS420 Limousine.
Labour estimate: Fitting a Jaguar XK straight-six typically takes 14–20 hours at £65–£95/hr (independent specialist) — classic Jaguar specialists like Guy Broad or P&K Thornton are recommended.

rows.metric: → Compare XK Straight-Six engine prices from UK specialists
How much does a Jaguar XK straight-six engine replacement cost?
rows.value: A reconditioned XK straight-six typically costs £5,000–£7,500 supply only, varying by displacement (3.4L vs 3.8L vs 4.2L) and specification (carburettor vs fuel injection). Full rebuilds by specialists often exceed £10,000.

rows.metric: Is the Jaguar XK straight-six a reliable engine?
rows.value: The XK straight-six earns 4.0★ out of 5 — it's fundamentally well-engineered and robust. Most issues stem from poor maintenance, infrequent use, or incorrect carburettor setup rather than design flaws.

rows.metric: What is the most common Jaguar XK straight-six failure?
rows.value: Timing chain tensioner wear is the most significant concern — the tensioners have small oil passages that can become blocked, reducing pressure on the chain. Rattling on startup is an early warning sign. A tensioner and chain upgrade typically costs £1,200–£2,000.

rows.metric: Which Jaguar models use the XK straight-six?
rows.value: The XK6 powered over 20 models across six decades — from the 1949 XK120 sports car through the Mk VII/VIII saloons, Mk 2, E-Type, S-Type, 420/420G, and XJ6 saloons through to 1986.

rows.metric: How long does the Jaguar XK straight-six last?
rows.value: With proper maintenance, the XK straight-six is capable of 100,000+ miles before requiring a rebuild. The engine is renowned for its durability — five of the top six cars at the 1957 Le Mans 24 Hours were Jaguar D-Types powered by XK engines. Regular servicing and avoiding overheating are key to longevity.

rows.metric: Why UK XK Straight-Six Owners Trust JaguarEngine.uk
rows.value: * Trusted Suppliers — Every garage and engine rebuilder in our network is vetted, rated and reviewed by real XK straight-six owners, as part of the Engine Finders network.

rows.metric: * Compare Companies — We show you real quotes from multiple UK specialists side by side, so you can compare prices, warranties and lead times before you commit.
rows.value: * UK Coverage — Our network spans England, Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland, with specialists who know the classic XK straight-six inside out.

rows.metric: Find the best Jaguar XK straight-six engine replacement UK drivers rely on. Compare real prices from trusted specialists on Engine Finders today and get back on the road with confidence.
